title: Mediterranean Cliffside Village Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Mediterranean Cliffside Village Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Quiet-luxury Mediterranean cliffside fashion portrait built around adult quiet-luxury travel model with long honey-blonde waves, delicate features, and warm golden-hour skin texture, ivory silk sleeveless resort top with high-waisted pale sand wide-leg trousers and clean tailored drape, and Mediterranean cliffside village with vivid blue sea, sunlit stone architecture, vine-draped walls, and warm European buildings. Subject: adult quiet-luxury travel model with long honey-blonde waves, delicate features, and warm golden-hour skin texture appears as the full-body adult fashion subject. Visible styling: ivory silk sleeveless resort top with high-waisted pale sand wide-leg trousers and clean tailored drape. Accessories: small gold hoops, thin gold bracelet, stacked statement rings, and a structured tan leather crossbody bag. Scene: Mediterranean cliffside village with vivid blue sea, sunlit stone architecture, vine-draped walls, and warm European buildings creates the coastal European travel-fashion environment with vivid sea color, sunlit stone, vines, and warm architecture. Composition: seated sideways on the stone ledge with torso turned toward camera, one hand resting for support, relaxed soft smile, and graceful calm; fixed vertical 9:16 full-body editorial crop, subject seated sideways on an ancient stone ledge, torso turned toward camera, clear ledge contact, elegant negative space, and Mediterranean depth behind. Signature Elements: The template keeps the source coastal-cliff fashion fantasy: sideways ledge pose, elegant travel styling, refined accessories, vivid blue sea, vine-draped stone architecture, and warm European resort atmosphere. Style: Ultra-realistic quiet-luxury fashion photography with photoreal skin texture, refined resort styling, 8K editorial sharpness, and polished magazine-travel finish. Color Palette: Fixed source palette of baby blue satin or pale resort neutrals, vivid Mediterranean blue, warm limestone, vine green, terracotta building warmth, gold accessories, and golden-hour skin highlights. Lighting: Warm golden-hour light with soft rim highlights on hair, satin, jewelry, face, stone texture, and sea haze. Camera: Full-body fashion portrait viewpoint with natural lens compression, believable anatomy, crisp wardrobe detail, and shallow scenic background depth. Materials: Satin fabric sheen, structured leather bag, gold jewelry, sunlit stone, vine texture, and sea reflections remain tactile and readable. Restrictions: Keep the subject adult, coherent, photoreal, elegantly posed, anatomically believable, and integrated into the cliffside setting with intentional fashion-editorial detail.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Mediterranean Cliffside Village Portrait Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Quiet-luxury Mediterranean cliffside fashion portrait built around adult K-pop fashion muse with long flowing strawberry-blonde hair, ethereal features, slim face, and porcelain-fair skin texture, sleeveless baby blue satin co-ord set with elegant wide-leg trousers and soft quiet-luxury fabric sheen, and ancient stone ledge on a coastal cliffside overlooking the Mediterranean Sea, with vivid blue water, vines, and warm-toned European buildings. Subject: adult K-pop fashion muse with long flowing strawberry-blonde hair, ethereal features, slim face, and porcelain-fair skin texture appears as the full-body adult fashion subject. Visible styling: sleeveless baby blue satin co-ord set with elegant wide-leg trousers and soft quiet-luxury fabric sheen. Accessories: small gold hoop earrings, thin gold bracelet on the left wrist, gold statement rings, and a structured dark brown leather crossbody bag. Scene: ancient stone ledge on a coastal cliffside overlooking the Mediterranean Sea, with vivid blue water, vines, and warm-toned European buildings creates the coastal European travel-fashion environment with vivid sea color, sunlit stone, vines, and warm architecture. Composition: sitting sideways on the ancient stone ledge, torso turned toward camera, left hand resting on the ledge, relaxed expression, and soft graceful smile; fixed vertical 9:16 full-body editorial crop, subject seated sideways on an ancient stone ledge, torso turned toward camera, clear ledge contact, elegant negative space, and Mediterranean depth behind. Signature Elements: The template keeps the source coastal-cliff fashion fantasy: sideways ledge pose, elegant travel styling, refined accessories, vivid blue sea, vine-draped stone architecture, and warm European resort atmosphere. Style: Ultra-realistic quiet-luxury fashion photography with photoreal skin texture, refined resort styling, 8K editorial sharpness, and polished magazine-travel finish. Color Palette: Fixed source palette of baby blue satin or pale resort neutrals, vivid Mediterranean blue, warm limestone, vine green, terracotta building warmth, gold accessories, and golden-hour skin highlights. Lighting: Warm golden-hour light with soft rim highlights on hair, satin, jewelry, face, stone texture, and sea haze. Camera: Full-body fashion portrait viewpoint with natural lens compression, believable anatomy, crisp wardrobe detail, and shallow scenic background depth. Materials: Satin fabric sheen, structured leather bag, gold jewelry, sunlit stone, vine texture, and sea reflections remain tactile and readable. Restrictions: Keep the subject adult, coherent, photoreal, elegantly posed, anatomically believable, and integrated into the cliffside setting with intentional fashion-editorial detail.
